description_full:
JLCPCB is a globally leading one-stop rapid electronics and mechatronics component manufacturer specializing in EDA software, PCB manufacturing, PCB assembly, 3D printing, and CNC machining. As a top semiconductor hardware company in China, we employ over 10,000+ staff and serve customers across 180+ countries worldwide. This year, our revenue will exceed $1.1 billion.




We are currently looking for 1【Digital Marketing Specialist】 based in 【Krefeld，German】.




Job Responsibilities

Job Responsibilities

1. Develop effective marketing strategies aligned with monthly goals and tailored to local channels.

2. Produce content in the relevant languages (service promotions, technical documentation, case studies, social media posts, emails, etc.).

3. Build and manage relationships with KOLs and content creators, facilitate collaborations, and ensure a positive ROI.

4. Coordinate the execution of local SEM campaigns and optimize them based on the conversion funnel.

5. Deploy on-site and off-site content based on SEO requirements.

Work with design and development teams to launch landing pages, creative assets, and tracking codes.




Qualifications

1. Bachelor’s degree or higher; preference given to candidates with degrees in Electronics, Mechanical Engineering, Telecommunications, or Computer Science.

2. Native speaker of German, French, Spanish, or Portuguese; English proficiency sufficient for business communication.

3. 1–3 years of experience in overseas marketing; familiarity with major local marketing platforms.

4. Strong focus on growth and conversion: understanding the path from content to traffic to registration/purchase.

5. Highly self-motivated, excellent communication skills, and goal-oriented.

JLCPCB GmbH is a rapid electronic & mechatronic components manufacturer specializing in EDA software, PCB manufacturing, PCB Assembly, 3D Printing, and CNC Machining.

* Globally leading one-stop rapid electronic & mechatronic components manufacturer， founded in 2006
* One of the earliest companies to utilize the PCB/PCBA online ordering platform.
* Over 800,000 businesses and innovators use JLCPCB’s products.

WHAT MAKES US SPECIAL :

🔖 Integrated service with fully online transactions and automated production.

🔖 Ensuring high quality and consistency from file review before production, raw materials guarantee, advanced equipment, and multiple testing before shipping.

🔖 Producing boards 24 hours and delivering in 2-4 days. Over 98% of worldwide orders were shipped on time.

🔖 Small batch friendly – only 5 pcs to get started
